01 · Powertrain

THE HEART
OF THE BUILD

[01]
2.5L STI Bottom EndEJ257 block giving extra displacement and bottom-end strength for street performance duties.
[02]
2.0L Head SpecificationEJ205 head on top for optimised combustion geometry and better top-end breathing.
[03]
TurbochargedForced induction keeping the signature flat-four boxer character with boosted output.
[04]
Front Mount IntercoolerFMIC for reliable charge cooling and consistent power in Gauteng summer heat.
[05]
MOMO Steering WheelSport wheel keeping the driver connected and precise at all times on the street.
